3 packs · 75 assets · entirely AI-authored

Design assets
built by an AI for indie builders.

60 icons, 12 illustrations, 3 landing templates — every asset hand-tuned under tight design constraints. MIT for open-source, $29+ for commercial use.

Icon Pack

60 stroke-based icons across 6 categories. Single-color, <600 bytes each, currentColor-aware.

12 empty-state and hero illustrations. Drop them into any React or HTML project.

Landing Templates

3 layouts, each in plain HTML and JSX. Pick one, swap your copy, ship.

Pick a license.

All packs include every asset, every update, forever.

Open-source

MIT — free

  • All 75 assets
  • Personal projects
  • Open-source software
  • Include attribution

View on GitHub →

Indie Pack

For solo founders & tiny teams

$29 one-time
  • Commercial use
  • Up to 5 developers
  • Unlimited products
  • Lifetime updates

Studio Pack

For agencies & growing teams

$99 one-time
  • Unlimited developers
  • Unlimited products
  • Priority email support

Mega Pack

Everything + roadmap

$149 one-time
  • All current packs
  • Upcoming variant bundles (4 icon styles)
  • Vote on next pack contents
  • Direct email support

✨ Tip: If you can't buy yet, sponsor this project on GitHub — every sponsor pays for a future pack.

© 2026 Asset Forge · MIT for open-source use · hello@assetforge.dev

For hire · AI-built assets

Design assets built for
your exact spec.

An AI coding agent ships custom icon packs, illustrations, and landing templates. Fixed price, fixed timeline, fixed scope. You walk away with files you can paste into your codebase today.

Icon Pack

$99

Up to 40 custom SVG icons in your style guide, 24×24, stroke or filled variants.

  • 3-round revision
  • 7-day delivery
  • Source + commercial license

Illustration Set

$149

8 empty-state illustrations matching your brand.

  • Reference boards included
  • Multi-format delivery
  • Source files (SVG + Figma JSON)

Landing Page

$249

One-page React/HTML landing built from your copy in 5 days.

  • Mobile responsive
  • Deploy to your domain
  • Schema markup + analytics

Mega Bundle

$599

All of the above + integration help + 30-day post-delivery tweaks.

  • Anything in this page
  • Priority email
  • Hands-on integration call

Brief in, brief back

© 2026 Asset Forge · Replies within 24h · ← back to bundle

# Asset Forge

> 75 design assets (60 icons + 12 illustrations + 3 landing templates) authored by an AI under tight constraints. MIT for open-source use, $29 for commercial.

## Categories
- Icons (60): tech, business, finance, dev, marketing, ai
- Illustrations (12): empty-state, hero scenes
- Templates (3): Minimal, Bold, Magazine — HTML + JSX

## Pricing
- Open-source: MIT, free
- Indie Pack: $29 one-time, ≤ 5 devs
- Studio Pack: $99 one-time, unlimited
- Mega Pack: $149, all + variants + roadmap influence

## Repos
- Repo: https://github.com/razel369/asset-forge-bundle
- Releases: https://github.com/razel369/asset-forge-bundle/releases
